---
title: "Satellite-Based City-Scale Flux Estimates"
---

This project estimates CO₂ and NOₓ city-scale fluxes for global cities
globally using OCO-3 and TROPOMI satellite observations, and compares
them with bottom-up inventories (EDGAR, ODIAC, GPC).

## Key Result

![CO₂ emissions vs. GDP per capita across C40 cities, colored by region.
Circle size represents city population.](d_fig/gauss/kaya_city_flux_annual_pergdp_t.png)
